Decoupled router resolution from per-instance overrides so custom routers only need `resolve(task)`.

compatibility_fixes: Default entity filtering remains actor-safe: analytical labels are excluded unless explicitly requested, which protects current simulation prepare flows.
Graph build still falls back to legacy fixed-character chunking when `source_units.json` is absent.
The persisted `graph_entity_index.json` keeps the legacy `entities` / `entity_types` surface while adding `analytical_objects`, `analytical_types`, and `citation_coverage`.
Project ontology storage remains additive so old callers can keep reading `entity_types` / `edge_types` while later phases consume `schema_mode`, `actor_types`, and `analytical_types`.

Left forecast aggregation behavior unchanged; downstream workers only receive richer evidence signals and citations.
